# Page 'Table API' Has Moved

The **Table API** has been moved. Redirecting to [//ci.apache.org/projects/flink/flink-docs-release-1.3/dev/table/index.html](<//ci.apache.org/projects/flink/flink-docs-release-1.3//dev/table/index.html>) in 1 second.
